Description: If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.
Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.

Array of reference line thresholds. Items: `countMetricOperation`, `uniqueCountMetricOperation`, `minMaxAvgMedianStdDevMetricOperation`, `sumMetricOperation`, `lastValueOperation`, `percentileOperation`, `percentileRanksOperation`, `staticOperationDefinition`, `formulaOperation`.
